calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-29-2009 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for settlement on the record as to Defendant Michael Vlastone and Default Prove-Up as to Co-Defendant Ishine Foundation.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Eric J. Rans, Esq. for Plaintiff Gateway Business Bank. Plaintiff's Witness Steve Brewer was sworn and direct examined.
Defendant Michael Vlastone present in pro per.
No appearance by Defaulted Co-Defendant Ishine Foundation.
Parties reached a settlement, terms were read into the record as follows:
Judgment shall be enter in favor of the Plaintiff and against both Defendants for possession of the premises located at 767 Bryant St., Unit #203, San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Plaintiff waived fees and costs.
Plaintiff will withhold seeking a lockout order until June 30, 2009.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ERIC J. RANS OF THE MICHELMAN & ROBINSON , LLP LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (714) 557-7990 APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MICHAEL VLASTONE'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Complaint IS GRANTED ONLY AS TO THE PHRASE "AND THAT SUCH AMOUNT BE TREBLED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/AY
